signal_sql: ((count - AVG(count) OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 23 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) / (STDDEV_SAMP(count) OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 23 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) + 1e-8)) * CASE WHEN ABS(log_ret_1) < QUANTILE_CONT(ABS(log_ret_1), 0.2) OVER (w ROWS BETWEEN 23 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END * SIGN(taker_buy_volume / (volume + 1e-8) - 0.5)
